name: 0n Core
description: Universal AI Command Center — 1,554 tools across 96 services. Paste your 0n token, describe any outcome.
conversation_starters: Write a blog post about AI automation
Scan my site for HIPAA compliance issues
What can I do with my current plan?

actions.name: verify_token
actions.description: Verify a 0n_ access token and retrieve user profile, plan, and connected services

actions.name: compose
actions.description: Generate AI content (blog, email, social post, use case) using the user's brand voice via Groq on the backend

actions.name: execute_command
actions.description: Execute a natural language command against the user's connected services

actions.name: generate_blog
actions.description: Generate a full blog post using the user's brand settings

actions.name: generate_use_case
actions.description: Generate a use case document using the user's industry and services

actions.name: hipaa_scan
actions.description: Run a HIPAA compliance scan against a given URL

actions.name: execute_addon
actions.description: Execute a specific 0n Core add-on by slug
